title: Vintage Travel Stamp Illustration
sourceTitle: Neo Editorial Design Showcase Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 neo editorial magazine design showcase poster for fictional exhibition title as bespoke artistic lettering over monochrome portrait layer, built around ECHO FORM / Design Futures as bespoke exhibition lettering. Subject: fictional exhibition title as bespoke artistic lettering over monochrome portrait layer becomes the centerpiece of the poster, with custom artistic lettering integrated over a monochrome photo layer and a high-chroma matte 3D object. Scene: neon edge blocks, high-chroma 3D matte object, magazine showcase layout defines the editorial design environment with neon edge blocks, dense grid structure, sticker-collage texture, and international design-show atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 9:16 asymmetric editorial grid: featured title as the main typographic centerpiece, monochromatic photo as background layer, neon-bright color blocks framing the edges, high-chroma single-tone 3D object placed as a sculptural accent, sparse whitespace, postage-stamp and arrow details, and structured magazine hierarchy. Signature Elements: Bespoke exhibition title lettering, neon border blocks, dense editorial grid, monochrome background photo, single-tone matte 3D object, postage stamps, arrows, English callouts, sparse whitespace, and international design-show mood. Style: World-class graphic design in neo editorial magazine format, publication-grade design showcase poster, sticker-collage aesthetic, subtle paper grain and noise, Awwwards and Behance level finish, and professional international exhibition polish. Color Palette: Neon-bright edge colors, monochrome photo base, one high-chroma object color, sharp black-and-white typography, paper-white negative space, and small accent marks. Lighting: Clean graphic lighting on the 3D matte object, flat editorial photo contrast, subtle paper texture depth, and controlled highlight separation between layers. Materials: Paper grain, printed magazine ink, sticker collage edges, matte rough 3D object surface, monochrome photo texture, and clean digital poster finish. Typography: ECHO FORM / Design Futures appears as the readable centerpiece title and supporting English callouts, using bespoke artistic lettering, dense editorial grid labels, small captions, arrows, stamps, and registered-symbol-style accent marks where appropriate. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Composition: Fixed 9:16 asymmetric editorial grid: featured title as the main typographic centerpiece, monochromatic photo as background layer, neon-bright color blocks framing the edges, high-chroma single-tone 3D object placed as a sculptural accent, sparse whitespace, postage-stamp and arrow details, and structured magazine hierarchy. Signature Elements: Bespoke exhibition title lettering, neon border blocks, dense editorial grid, monochrome background photo, single-tone matte 3D object, postage stamps, arrows, English callouts, sparse whitespace, and international design-show mood. Style: World-class graphic design in neo editorial magazine format, publication-grade design showcase poster, sticker-collage aesthetic, subtle paper grain and noise, Awwwards and Behance level finish, and professional international exhibition polish. Color Palette: Neon-bright edge colors, monochrome photo base, one high-chroma object color, sharp black-and-white typography, paper-white negative space, and small accent marks. Lighting: Clean graphic lighting on the 3D matte object, flat editorial photo contrast, subtle paper texture depth, and controlled highlight separation between layers. Materials: Paper grain, printed magazine ink, sticker collage edges, matte rough 3D object surface, monochrome photo texture, and clean digital poster finish. Typography: ECHO FORM / Design Futures appears as the readable centerpiece title and supporting English callouts, using bespoke artistic lettering, dense editorial grid labels, small captions, arrows, stamps, and registered-symbol-style accent marks where appropriate. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
